title: 📰 SEC Greenlights DEX Frontends, Waives Broker-Dealer Registration for UI Providers
message: SEC Trading and Markets won't object to 'Covered User Interface Providers' operating DEX frontends without broker-dealer registration, clearing a major compliance fog for DeFi apps.

title: 📰 Vercel Breach Leaks Crypto Project API Keys, Orca and Web3 Teams Scramble
message: Vercel disclosed a security incident exposing customer API keys, forcing crypto teams hosting wallet UIs on the platform to rotate credentials en masse.

title: 📰 Kelp DAO Bridge Drained for $292M in rsETH, Eclipsing Drift as 2026's Biggest Hack
message: An attacker drained 116,500 rsETH — about $292M and 18% of supply — from Kelp's LayerZero bridge, making it 2026's largest DeFi exploit.

title: 914 New Pages Indexed — Publish Queue Drained
message: The full backlog of built-but-unpromoted pages (914 total) has been promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Site now indexes 1,515 URLs across Learn, Exchanges, Investing, Wallets, DeFi, Cards, NFTs and more.

title: 📰 Grinex Halts Trading After $15M State-Level Attack Drains USDT Reserves
message: Sanctioned Russian exchange Grinex suspended trading after attackers moved $15M in USDT onto Tron and Ethereum, blaming a hostile-state operation.

title: 📰 Charles Schwab Opens Spot BTC and ETH Trading to Retail Clients
message: Schwab rolled out direct spot Bitcoin and Ether trading for retail accounts, with custody in-house and execution routed to Paxos.

title: 📰 UK FCA Drops '24-Hour Trap' in Final Crypto Framework
message: The FCA's final cryptoasset rulebook treats any firm holding client assets for more than 24 hours as a regulated custodian, forcing most UK DEX frontends and fintech wrappers to seek full safeguarding licenses.
